    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./crates/todo/src/devshell/mod.rs",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 53
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 99,
            "column": 18
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "pub fn run_main_from_args&lt;R, W1, W2&gt;(",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "    args: &amp;[String],",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "    is_tty: bool,",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "    stdin: &amp;mut R,",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "    stdout: &amp;mut W1,",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "    stderr: &amp;mut W2,",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": ") -&gt; Result&lt;(), Box&lt;dyn std::error::Error&gt;&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "where",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "    R: std::io::BufRead + std::io::Read,",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "    W1: std::io::Write,",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "    W2: std::io::Write,",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "{",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "    let path = match args {",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "        [] | [_] =&gt; Path::new(\".dev_shell.bin\"),",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "        [_, path] =&gt; Path::new(path),",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "        _ =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "            writeln!(stderr, \"usage: dev_shell [path]\")?;",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "            return Err(Box::new(std::io::Error::other(\"usage\")));",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "    let vfs = match serialization::load_from_file(path) {",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "        Ok(v) =&gt; v,",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "        Err(e) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "            if e.kind() == io::ErrorKind::NotFound {",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "                if args.len() &gt; 1 {",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "                    let _ = writeln!(stderr, \"File not found, starting with empty VFS\");",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "                }",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "            } else {",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "                let _ = writeln!(stderr, \"Failed to load {}: {}\", path.display(), e);",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "            }",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "            Vfs::new()",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "    let vfs = Rc::new(RefCell::new(vfs));",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "    repl::run(&amp;vfs, is_tty, path, stdin, stdout, stderr).map_err(|()| {",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "        Box::new(std::io::Error::other(\"repl error\")) as Box&lt;dyn std::error::Error&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "    })?;",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "    Ok(())",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "/// Run the devshell with given args and streams (for tests).",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "///",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "/// # Errors",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "/// Returns &#96;RunWithError::Usage&#96; on invalid args; &#96;RunWithError::ReplFailed&#96; if the REPL exits with error.",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "pub fn run_with&lt;R, W1, W2&gt;(",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "    args: &amp;[String],",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "    stdin: &amp;mut R,",
            "lineNumber": 100
          }
        ]
      },

            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "    let path = match args {",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 111
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./crates/todo/src/devshell/completion.rs",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 34,
            "column": 59
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 107,
            "column": 45
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": " {",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "    let slice = line.get(..pos).unwrap_or(\"\");",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    let mut tokens = Vec::new();",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    let mut i = 0;",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "    let bytes = slice.as_bytes();",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "    while i &lt; bytes.len() {",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "        // Skip whitespace",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "        while i &lt; bytes.len() &amp;&amp; bytes[i].is_ascii_whitespace() {",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "            i += 1;",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "        if i &gt;= bytes.len() {",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "            break;",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "        let token_start = i;",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "        // Delimiter \"2&gt;\" as one token",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "        if i + 1 &lt; bytes.len() &amp;&amp; bytes[i] == b'2' &amp;&amp; bytes[i + 1] == b'&gt;' {",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "            tokens.push((\"2&gt;\".to_string(), token_start));",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "            i += 2;",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "            continue;",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "        // Single-char delimiters",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "        if bytes[i] == b'|' || bytes[i] == b'&lt;' || bytes[i] == b'&gt;' {",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "            let ch = char::from(bytes[i]);",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "            tokens.push((ch.to_string(), token_start));",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "            i += 1;",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "            continue;",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "        // Collect run of non-delimiter, non-whitespace (stop before \"2&gt;\", |, &lt;, &gt;, or space)",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "        let start = i;",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "        while i &lt; bytes.len() {",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "            if bytes[i].is_ascii_whitespace() {",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "                break;",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "            }",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "            if bytes[i] == b'|' || bytes[i] == b'&lt;' || bytes[i] == b'&gt;' {",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "                break;",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "            }",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "            if bytes[i] == b'2' &amp;&amp; i + 1 &lt; bytes.len() &amp;&amp; bytes[i + 1] == b'&gt;' {",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "                break;",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "            }",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "            i += 1;",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "        let token = slice[start..i].to_string();",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "        if !token.is_empty() {",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "            tokens.push((token, start));",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "    tokens",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "/// Built-in command names for tab completion (must match command.rs).",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "const BUILTIN_COMMANDS: &amp;[&amp;str] = &amp;[",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"pwd\",",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"cd\",",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"ls\",",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"mkdir\",",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"cat\",",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"touch\",",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"echo\",",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"save\",",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"export-readonly\",",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"export_readonly\",",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"exit\",",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"quit\",",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"help\",",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "];",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "/// Command completion: case-insensitive prefix match. Returns matching command names.",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "#[must_use]",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "pub fn complete_commands(prefix: &amp;str) -&gt; Vec&lt;String&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "    let prefix_lower = prefix.to_lowercase();",
            "lineNumber": 108
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.39019790291786194
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./crates/todo/src/devshell/repl.rs",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 146
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 218,
            "column": 52
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "fn run_readline&lt;R, W1, W2&gt;(",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "    vfs: &amp;Rc&lt;RefCell&lt;Vfs&gt;&gt;,",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "    bin_path: &amp;Path,",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "    stdin: &amp;mut R,",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "    stdout: &amp;mut W1,",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "    stderr: &amp;mut W2,",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": ") -&gt; Result&lt;(), ()&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "where",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "    R: BufRead + Read,",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "    W1: Write,",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "    W2: Write,",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "{",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "    let mut line = String::new();",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "    loop {",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "        line.clear();",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "        let cwd = vfs.borrow().cwd().to_string();",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "        let _ = write!(stdout, \"{cwd} $ \");",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "        let _ = stdout.flush();",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "        let n = stdin.read_line(&amp;mut line).map_err(|_| ())?;",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "        if n == 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "            save_on_exit(vfs, bin_path, stderr);",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "            return Ok(());",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "text": "        if process_line(vfs, &amp;line, stdin, stdout, stderr) == StepResult::Exit {",
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "            break;",
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "    save_on_exit(vfs, bin_path, stderr);",
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "    Ok(())",
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "text": "#[cfg(test)]",
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "text": "mod tests {",
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "text": "    use std::cell::RefCell;",
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "text": "    use std::io::Cursor;",
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": "    use std::rc::Rc;",
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": "    use super::super::vfs::Vfs;",
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": "    use super::{process_line, StepResult};",
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "text": "    #[test]",
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "text": "    fn process_line_empty_returns_continue() {",
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "        let vfs = Rc::new(RefCell::new(Vfs::new()));",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "        let mut stdin = Cursor::new(b\"\");",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "        let mut stdout = Vec::new();",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "text": "        let mut stderr = Vec::new();",
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "text": "        let r = process_line(&amp;vfs, \"  \\n\", &amp;mut stdin, &amp;mut stdout, &amp;mut stderr);",
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "text": "        assert_eq!(r, StepResult::Continue);",
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "text": "    #[test]",
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "text": "    fn process_line_exit_returns_exit() {",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "        let vfs = Rc::new(RefCell::new(Vfs::new()));",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "        let mut stdin = Cursor::new(b\"\");",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "        let mut stdout = Vec::new();",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "        let mut stderr = Vec::new();",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "        let r = process_line(&amp;vfs, \"exit\", &amp;mut stdin, &amp;mut stdout, &amp;mut stderr);",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "        assert_eq!(r, StepResult::Exit);",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "    #[test]",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "    fn process_line_quit_returns_exit() {",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "text": "        let vfs = Rc::new(RefCell::new(Vfs::new()));",
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "text": "        let mut stdin = Cursor::new(b\"\");",
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "text": "        let mut stdout = Vec::new();",
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "text": "        let mut stderr = Vec::new();",
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "text": "        let r = process_line(&amp;vfs, \"quit\", &amp;mut stdin, &amp;mut stdout, &amp;mut stderr);",
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "text": "        assert_eq!(r, StepResult::Exit);",
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "text": "    #[test]",
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "text": "    fn process_line_parse_error_returns_continue() {",
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "text": "        let vfs = Rc::new(RefCell::new(Vfs::new()));",
            "lineNumber": 219
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.38435909152030945
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-03-10_08-33Z-dev.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 9673
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 9712
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- **A**：**内置命令** — 在 REPL 里输入 &#96;todo&#96; / &#96;todo list&#96; / &#96;todo add \"标题\"&#96; 等；在 shell 进程里**调子进程**执行 &#96;cargo xtask todo ...&#96;（要求从项目根跑 dev_shell，且能找到 &#96;cargo&#96;）。",
            "lineNumber": 9674
          },
          {
            "text": "- **B**：**内置命令** — 同上用法，但在 dev_shell 里**直接依赖并调用 &#96;xtask-todo-lib&#96;**（需把 dev_shell 加入 workspace 或通过 path 依赖，数据仍写当前目录的 &#96;.todo.json&#96;）。",
            "lineNumber": 9675
          },
          {
            "text": "- **C**：**仅文档 + 外部用法** — 不新增内置命令，只在 README/示例里写「在**另一个终端**或退出 dev_shell 后，在项目根执行 &#96;cargo xtask todo ...&#96;」，并附一段示例会话（先 dev_shell 再 todo 的典型流程）。",
            "lineNumber": 9676
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9677
          },
          {
            "text": "请选 **A / B / C**（若选 A 或 B，可以说下是否接受「必须在 xtask_todo 项目根下运行 dev_shell」这个前提）。",
            "lineNumber": 9678
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9679
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 9680
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9681
          },
          {
            "text": "_**User**_",
            "lineNumber": 9682
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9683
          },
          {
            "text": "B",
            "lineNumber": 9684
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9685
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 9686
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9687
          },
          {
            "text": "_**Agent (model default, mode Agent)**_",
            "lineNumber": 9688
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9689
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;think&gt;&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Thought Process&lt;/summary&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 9690
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9691
          },
          {
            "text": "The user chose B: builtin command that directly depends on and calls &#96;xtask-todo-lib&#96; (dev_shell would need to be in the workspace or use path dependency; data still written to current directory's .todo.json).",
            "lineNumber": 9692
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9693
          },
          {
            "text": "So the design will be:",
            "lineNumber": 9694
          },
          {
            "text": "1. Documentation: README (and maybe example session) showing todo usage.",
            "lineNumber": 9695
          },
          {
            "text": "2. Integration: dev_shell as a builtin command using xtask-todo-lib - so we need to add dev_shell to the workspace or give it a path dependency to crates/todo (xtask-todo-lib), then implement a &#96;todo&#96; builtin that parses subcommands (list, add, ...) and calls the library.",
            "lineNumber": 9696
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9697
          },
          {
            "text": "I should now propose 2-3 approaches with trade-offs, then present the design in sections for approval. I won't write code yet - brainstorming says present design and get approval first.",
            "lineNumber": 9698
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/details&gt;&lt;/think&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 9699
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9700
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 9701
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9702
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9703
          },
          {
            "text": "选 **B**（内置命令 + 直接依赖 &#96;xtask-todo-lib&#96;）已记下。",
            "lineNumber": 9704
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9705
          },
          {
            "text": "下面给出 **2～3 种实现思路** 和推荐方案，然后分节给出可落地的设计，你按节确认即可。",
            "lineNumber": 9706
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9707
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 9708
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9709
          },
          {
            "text": "## 方案概览",
            "lineNumber": 9710
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9711
          },
          {
            "text": "| 方案 | 做法 | 优点 | 缺点 |",
            "lineNumber": 9712
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.35582560300827026
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-10-dev-shell-todo-design.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 52
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# dev_shell 中展示 Todo 功能 — 设计说明",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "**日期**：2026-03-10  ",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "**范围**：在 &#96;examples/dev_shell&#96; 中通过内置命令 &#96;todo&#96; 展示 xtask-todo 能力；文档与入口并存。  ",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "**状态**：设计已获用户逐节通过（§1 依赖与数据、§2 内置命令形态与子命令集、§3 实现边界与文档）。",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "## 1. 设计目标与方案选择",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "- **展示形式**：文档（README） + dev_shell 内 **todo 内置命令**（方案 B）。",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "- **集成方式**：内置命令直接依赖并调用 &#96;xtask-todo-lib&#96;（path 依赖），不通过子进程调用 &#96;cargo xtask todo&#96;。",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "- **数据**：读写 **宿主当前工作目录** 下的 &#96;.todo.json&#96;，与在项目根运行 &#96;cargo xtask todo&#96; 时共用同一数据文件。",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "## 2. 依赖与数据（§1 已通过）",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.1 依赖",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "- 在 &#96;examples/dev_shell/Cargo.toml&#96; 中增加对 workspace 内 todo 库的 path 依赖，例如：",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "  &#96;&#96;&#96;toml",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "  [dependencies]",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "  todo = { path = \"../../crates/todo\" }",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "  &#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "  若将 dev_shell 纳入 workspace，则路径按 workspace 布局调整（如 &#96;path = \"../crates/todo\"&#96;）。",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.2 数据路径",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;todo&#96; 内置命令使用 **&#96;std::env::current_dir()&#96;** 下的 &#96;.todo.json&#96;。",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "- 不在 dev_shell 的虚拟 FS 中读写；数据始终在宿主目录，与 &#96;cargo xtask todo&#96; 一致。",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.3 文档约定",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "- README 中增加「Todo 待办」小节：说明在 shell 内输入 &#96;todo&#96; / &#96;todo list&#96; / &#96;todo add \"标题\"&#96; 等与在项目根执行 &#96;cargo xtask todo&#96; 共用同一 &#96;.todo.json&#96;，并给出简短示例会话（如先 &#96;todo add \"某任务\"&#96;，再 &#96;todo list&#96;）。",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "## 3. 内置命令形态与子命令集（§2 已通过）",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "### 3.1 命令名与无参行为",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "- REPL 中输入 **&#96;todo&#96;** 或 **&#96;todo &lt;子命令&gt; [参数...]&#96;**。",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "- 无参数时：等价于 **&#96;todo list&#96;**（或打印简短用法，二者择一，实现时定）。",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "### 3.2 首期子命令",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "| 子命令   | 说明           |",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "|----------|----------------|",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;list&#96;   | 列出待办       |",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;add&#96;    | 添加待办       |",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;show&#96;   | 查看单条       |",
            "lineNumber": 52
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.34591543674468994
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./crates/todo/src/bin/cargo_devshell/main.rs",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 9,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "//! Binary for &#96;cargo devshell&#96;: delegates to the lib's devshell so all logic is test-covered.",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "use std::io::Write;",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "fn main() {",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "    if let Err(e) = xtask_todo_lib::devshell::run_main() {",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "        let _ = writeln!(std::io::stderr(), \"{e}\");",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "        std::process::exit(1);",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 10
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.33007121086120605
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./crates/todo/src/devshell/completion.rs",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 105
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 170,
            "column": 5
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "#[must_use]",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "pub fn complete_commands(prefix: &amp;str) -&gt; Vec&lt;String&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "    let prefix_lower = prefix.to_lowercase();",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "    BUILTIN_COMMANDS",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "        .iter()",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "        .filter(|c| c.to_lowercase().starts_with(prefix_lower.as_str()))",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "        .map(|s| (*s).to_string())",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "        .collect()",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "/// Path completion: prefix may contain slashes; only the last segment is used for matching.",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "/// &#96;parent_names&#96; is the list of names in the parent directory. Empty prefix returns all.",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "#[must_use]",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "pub fn complete_path(prefix: &amp;str, parent_names: &amp;[String]) -&gt; Vec&lt;String&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "    let last = prefix.rsplit('/').next().unwrap_or(prefix);",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "    parent_names",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "        .iter()",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "        .filter(|n| n.starts_with(last))",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "        .cloned()",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "        .collect()",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "#[allow(dead_code)]",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "const PATH_TRIGGER_TOKENS: &amp;[&amp;str] = &amp;[",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"cd\",",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"ls\",",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"cat\",",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"mkdir\",",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"touch\",",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"export-readonly\",",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"export_readonly\",",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"&gt;\",",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"2&gt;\",",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"&lt;\",",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "];",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "/// Returns the (prefix, start) for the token that contains the cursor at &#96;pos&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "/// Prefix is the part of the token from start up to pos (what the user has typed so far).",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "fn token_at_cursor(line: &amp;str, tokens: &amp;[(String, usize)], pos: usize) -&gt; Option&lt;(String, usize)&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "    if pos &gt; line.len() {",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "        return None;",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (token, start) in tokens {",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "        let end = start + token.len();",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "        if *start &lt;= pos &amp;&amp; end &gt;= pos {",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "            let prefix = line.get(*start..pos).unwrap_or(\"\").to_string();",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "            return Some((prefix, *start));",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Cursor in trailing whitespace: prefix empty, start at pos",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "    if !tokens.is_empty() {",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "        let (last_token, last_start) = tokens.last().unwrap();",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "        let last_end = last_start + last_token.len();",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "        if pos &gt;= last_end {",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "            return Some((String::new(), pos));",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "    None",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "/// Parse completion context at (line, pos). Returns None if line empty or pos out of bounds.",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "#[must_use]",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "pub fn completion_context(line: &amp;str, pos: usize) -&gt; Option&lt;CompletionContext&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "    if line.is_empty() {",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "text": "        return None;",
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 171
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.32596829533576965
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./crates/todo/src/devshell/command.rs",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 274,
            "column": 8
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 329,
            "column": 48
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "    save_todos(list).map_err(|_| BuiltinError::TodoSaveFailed)?;",
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "text": "    Ok(())",
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "text": "fn run_todo_complete(",
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "text": "    stderr: &amp;mut dyn Write,",
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "text": "    rest: &amp;[String],",
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "text": "    list: &amp;mut TodoList&lt;InMemoryStore&gt;,",
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "text": ") -&gt; Result&lt;(), BuiltinError&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "text": "    let id_str = rest.first().ok_or(BuiltinError::TodoArgError)?;",
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "    let id_raw: u64 = id_str.parse().map_err(|_| BuiltinError::TodoArgError)?;",
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "text": "    let id = TodoId::from_raw(id_raw).ok_or(BuiltinError::TodoArgError)?;",
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "text": "    list.complete(id, false).map_err(|e| {",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "text": "        let _ = writeln!(stderr, \"todo complete: {e}\");",
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "        BuiltinError::TodoDataError",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "text": "    })?;",
            "lineNumber": 291
          },
          {
            "text": "    save_todos(list).map_err(|_| BuiltinError::TodoSaveFailed)?;",
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "text": "    Ok(())",
            "lineNumber": 293
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 294
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "text": "fn run_todo_delete(",
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "text": "    stderr: &amp;mut dyn Write,",
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "text": "    rest: &amp;[String],",
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {
            "text": "    list: &amp;mut TodoList&lt;InMemoryStore&gt;,",
            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "text": ") -&gt; Result&lt;(), BuiltinError&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "text": "    let id_str = rest.first().ok_or(BuiltinError::TodoArgError)?;",
            "lineNumber": 301
          },
          {
            "text": "    let id_raw: u64 = id_str.parse().map_err(|_| BuiltinError::TodoArgError)?;",
            "lineNumber": 302
          },
          {
            "text": "    let id = TodoId::from_raw(id_raw).ok_or(BuiltinError::TodoArgError)?;",
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "text": "    list.delete(id).map_err(|e| {",
            "lineNumber": 304
          },
          {
            "text": "        let _ = writeln!(stderr, \"todo delete: {e}\");",
            "lineNumber": 305
          },
          {
            "text": "        BuiltinError::TodoDataError",
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "text": "    })?;",
            "lineNumber": 307
          },
          {
            "text": "    save_todos(list).map_err(|_| BuiltinError::TodoSaveFailed)?;",
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "text": "    Ok(())",
            "lineNumber": 309
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 310
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311
          },
          {
            "text": "fn run_todo_search(",
            "lineNumber": 312
          },
          {
            "text": "    stdout: &amp;mut dyn Write,",
            "lineNumber": 313
          },
          {
            "text": "    rest: &amp;[String],",
            "lineNumber": 314
          },
          {
            "text": "    list: &amp;TodoList&lt;InMemoryStore&gt;,",
            "lineNumber": 315
          },
          {
            "text": ") -&gt; Result&lt;(), BuiltinError&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 316
          },
          {
            "text": "    let keyword = rest.join(\" \").trim().to_string();",
            "lineNumber": 317
          },
          {
            "text": "    for t in list.search(&amp;keyword) {",
            "lineNumber": 318
          },
          {
            "text": "        let done = if t.completed { \" [done]\" } else { \"\" };",
            "lineNumber": 319
          },
          {
            "text": "        writeln!(stdout, \"{}. {}{}\", t.id.as_u64(), t.title, done)",
            "lineNumber": 320
          },
          {
            "text": "            .map_err(|_| BuiltinError::RedirectWrite)?;",
            "lineNumber": 321
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 322
          },
          {
            "text": "    Ok(())",
            "lineNumber": 323
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 324
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325
          },
          {
            "text": "fn run_todo_stats(",
            "lineNumber": 326
          },
          {
            "text": "    stdout: &amp;mut dyn Write,",
            "lineNumber": 327
          },
          {
            "text": "    list: &amp;TodoList&lt;InMemoryStore&gt;,",
            "lineNumber": 328
          },
          {
            "text": ") -&gt; Result&lt;(), BuiltinError&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 329
          },
          {
            "text": "    let (total, open, completed) = list.stats();",
            "lineNumber": 330
          }
        ]
      },

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./crates/todo/src/devshell/command.rs",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 172,
            "column": 9
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 235,
            "column": 19
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "    Ok(RunResult::Continue)",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "text": "fn run_todo_list(",
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "text": "    stdout: &amp;mut dyn Write,",
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "text": "    list: &amp;TodoList&lt;InMemoryStore&gt;,",
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": "    rest: &amp;[String],",
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": ") -&gt; Result&lt;(), BuiltinError&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": "    let use_json = rest.iter().any(|a| a == \"--json\");",
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": "    if use_json {",
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "text": "        #[derive(serde::Serialize)]",
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "text": "        struct TodoRow {",
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "text": "            id: u64,",
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "            title: String,",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "            completed: bool,",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "text": "        let rows: Vec&lt;TodoRow&gt; = list",
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "text": "            .list()",
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "text": "            .into_iter()",
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "text": "            .map(|t| TodoRow {",
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "text": "                id: t.id.as_u64(),",
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "text": "                title: t.title.clone(),",
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "text": "                completed: t.completed,",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "            })",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "            .collect();",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "        let json = serde_json::to_string_pretty(&amp;rows).map_err(|_| BuiltinError::TodoDataError)?;",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "        writeln!(stdout, \"{json}\").map_err(|_| BuiltinError::RedirectWrite)?;",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else {",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "        for t in list.list() {",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "            let done = if t.completed { \" [done]\" } else { \"\" };",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "            writeln!(stdout, \"{}. {}{}\", t.id.as_u64(), t.title, done)",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "                .map_err(|_| BuiltinError::RedirectWrite)?;",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "text": "    Ok(())",
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "text": "fn run_todo_add(",
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "text": "    stdout: &amp;mut dyn Write,",
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "text": "    stderr: &amp;mut dyn Write,",
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "text": "    rest: &amp;[String],",
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "text": "    list: &amp;mut TodoList&lt;InMemoryStore&gt;,",
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "text": ") -&gt; Result&lt;(), BuiltinError&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "text": "    let title = rest.join(\" \").trim().to_string();",
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "text": "    if title.is_empty() {",
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "text": "        writeln!(stderr, \"todo add: title must be non-empty\")",
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "text": "            .map_err(|_| BuiltinError::RedirectWrite)?;",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "        return Err(BuiltinError::TodoArgError);",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "    let id = list.create(&amp;title).map_err(|e| {",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "        let _ = writeln!(stderr, \"todo add: {e}\");",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "        BuiltinError::TodoArgError",
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "text": "    })?;",
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": "    save_todos(list).map_err(|_| BuiltinError::TodoSaveFailed)?;",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "text": "    writeln!(stdout, \"{}\", id.as_u64()).map_err(|_| BuiltinError::RedirectWrite)?;",
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "text": "    Ok(())",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "text": "fn run_todo_show(",
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": "    stdout: &amp;mut dyn Write,",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "text": "    rest: &amp;[String]",
            "lineNumber": 236
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.31979379057884216
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-03-10_08-33Z-dev.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 9638
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 9675
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "**你更希望「展示 todo」是以哪种形式出现？**",
            "lineNumber": 9640
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9641
          },
          {
            "text": "- **A**：在 dev_shell 里增加**内置命令**（例如在 REPL 里输入 &#96;todo list&#96; / &#96;todo add \"标题\"&#96; 等），直接调用本项目的 todo 能力（依赖 &#96;xtask-todo-lib&#96; 或通过子进程执行 &#96;cargo xtask todo&#96;）。",
            "lineNumber": 9642
          },
          {
            "text": "- **B**：**只做文档/示例**：在 dev_shell 的 README 或示例里加一节，说明「在本项目根目录可用 &#96;cargo xtask todo&#96; 管理待办」，并给一段示例命令与输出，不往 dev_shell 里加新命令。",
            "lineNumber": 9643
          },
          {
            "text": "- **C**：**两者都要**：既在文档里说明，又在 dev_shell 里提供某种 todo 入口（例如一个内置命令或脚本）。",
            "lineNumber": 9644
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9645
          },
          {
            "text": "请选 **A / B / C**（可简短补充一句，例如「希望能在 shell 里直接敲 todo」或「先做文档即可」）。",
            "lineNumber": 9646
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9647
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 9648
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9649
          },
          {
            "text": "_**User**_",
            "lineNumber": 9650
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9651
          },
          {
            "text": "C",
            "lineNumber": 9652
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9653
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 9654
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9655
          },
          {
            "text": "_**Agent (model default, mode Agent)**_",
            "lineNumber": 9656
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9657
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;think&gt;&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Thought Process&lt;/summary&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 9658
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9659
          },
          {
            "text": "The user chose C: both documentation and a todo entry point in dev_shell (e.g. a builtin command or script). I need to continue the brainstorming flow: next step is to ask one more clarifying question if needed, or propose 2-3 approaches with trade-offs, then present the design in sections.",
            "lineNumber": 9660
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9661
          },
          {
            "text": "For \"both\": we need to design (1) where and how to document (README section, example session), and (2) how to provide a todo \"entry point\" in dev_shell - builtin that calls out to cargo xtask todo, or builtin that uses the library, or a script. Let me ask one more question to narrow the \"entry point\" form before proposing approaches.",
            "lineNumber": 9662
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/details&gt;&lt;/think&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 9663
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9664
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 9665
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9666
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9667
          },
          {
            "text": "选 **C**（文档 + dev_shell 里的 todo 入口）已记下。",
            "lineNumber": 9668
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9669
          },
          {
            "text": "再确认一点，方便定实现方式：",
            "lineNumber": 9670
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9671
          },
          {
            "text": "**dev_shell 里的「todo 入口」你更倾向哪种？**",
            "lineNumber": 9672
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9673
          },
          {
            "text": "- **A**：**内置命令** — 在 REPL 里输入 &#96;todo&#96; / &#96;todo list&#96; / &#96;todo add \"标题\"&#96; 等；在 shell 进程里**调子进程**执行 &#96;cargo xtask todo ...&#96;（要求从项目根跑 dev_shell，且能找到 &#96;cargo&#96;）。",
            "lineNumber": 9674
          },
          {
            "text": "- **B**：**内置命令** — 同上用法，但在 dev_shell 里**直接依赖并调用 &#96;xtask-todo-lib&#96;**（需把 dev_shell 加入 workspace 或通过 path 依赖，数据仍写当前目录的 &#96;.todo.json&#96;）。",
            "lineNumber": 9675
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.31117329001426697
    },
    {

            "lineNumber": 386

          {

          },
          {
            "text": "    .map_err(|_| BuiltinError::RedirectWrite)?;",

            "text": "    writeln!(stdout, \"  todo [list|add|show|update|complete|delete|search|stats] ...  todo list (shares .todo.json with cargo xtask todo)\")",
            "lineNumber": 393
          },
          {
            "text": "        .map_err(|_| BuiltinError::RedirectWrite)?;",

            "lineNumber": 395
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "    writeln!(stdout, \"  help             show this help\")",

          },
          {
            "text": "        .map_err(|_| BuiltinError::RedirectWrite)?;",

          {
            "lineNumber": 401
          },
          {
            "text": "fn run_builtin_export_readonly(",

          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./crates/todo/src/devshell/tests/run_basic.rs",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 76,
            "column": 26
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "//! Basic &#96;run_with&#96; tests: pwd, mkdir, ls, echo, help, save, cd, todo list/stats/add.",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "use std::io::Cursor;",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "use super::super::run_with;",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "#[test]",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "fn run_with_pwd_mkdir_ls_exit() {",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "    let input = \"pwd\\nmkdir foo\\nls\\nexit\\n\";",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "    let mut stdin = Cursor::new(input);",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "    let mut stdout = Vec::new();",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "    let mut stderr = Vec::new();",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "    run_with(",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "        &amp;[\"dev_shell\".to_string()],",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "        &amp;mut stdin,",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "        &amp;mut stdout,",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "        &amp;mut stderr,",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "    )",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "    .unwrap();",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "    let out = String::from_utf8(stdout).unwrap();",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "    assert!(out.contains(\" $ \"), \"expected prompt in output: {out}\");",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "    assert!(out.contains(\"foo\"), \"expected ls to list foo: {out}\");",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "#[test]",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "fn run_with_echo_and_exit() {",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "    let input = \"echo hello\\nquit\\n\";",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "    let mut stdin = Cursor::new(input);",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "    let mut stdout = Vec::new();",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "    let mut stderr = Vec::new();",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "    run_with(",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "        &amp;[\"dev_shell\".to_string()],",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "        &amp;mut stdin,",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "        &amp;mut stdout,",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "        &amp;mut stderr,",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "    )",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    .unwrap();",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    let out = String::from_utf8(stdout).unwrap();",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "    assert!(out.contains(\"hello\"), \"expected echo output: {out}\");",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "#[test]",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "fn run_with_usage_error() {",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "    let mut stdin = Cursor::new(\"\");",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "    let mut stdout = Vec::new();",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "    let mut stderr = Vec::new();",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "    let r = run_with(",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "        &amp;[\"a\".to_string(), \"b\".to_string(), \"c\".to_string()],",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "        &amp;mut stdin,",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "        &amp;mut stdout,",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "        &amp;mut stderr,",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "    );",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "    assert!(r.is_err());",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "}",

- **C**：**两者都要**——既支持在 dev_shell 里跑脚本（A），也支持在项目里用脚本驱动 xtask/外部命令（B），两套可以不同语法或共用一种语法。

- Minimal: just "run a file" as script (e.g. `dev_shell script.dsh` or `dev_shell -f script.dsh`) — we might already have this via `dev_shell < script.txt`.

已记录：脚本机制**只用于 dev_shell**，脚本内容为 dev_shell 内置命令序列，在同一 VFS/REPL 下执行，用于多步任务自动化。

---

下一项需要先定下来：

**你希望脚本「像 Shell」到什么程度？**

- **A. 最小**：能「按文件跑」即可。例如 `dev_shell script.dsh` 或 `dev_shell < script.dsh`，按行执行文件里的命令；支持注释（`#`）和空行即可，不做控制流。
- **B. 中等**：在 A 基础上加「遇错即停」。例如某条命令失败就中止脚本并返回非零退出码（类似 bash 的 `set -e`），便于自动化时及时发现问题。
- **C. 更完整**：在 B 基础上再增加控制流。例如变量（`$VAR`）、条件（`if`）、循环（`for`/`while`）、以及可选的 `source` 或 `./script` 调用子脚本。

请选 **A / B / C**（或简单说你的期望）。

---

_**User**_

C

---

_**Agent (model default, mode Agent)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

The user chose C: in addition to (B) "exit on first error", they want control flow — variables ($VAR), conditionals (if), loops (for/while), and optionally source or ./script for sub-scripts.

So the scope is:
- dev_shell only (A from first question)
- Full scripting: run script file, exit on error option, variables, if/for/while, optionally source or run sub-script

This is a substantial feature. I need to:
1. Propose 2-3 approaches with trade-offs
2. Present design in sections for approval
3. No implementation until approved (HARD-GATE)

Approaches could be:
- **Approach 1 (Interpret script AST)**: Define a small script language (lexer + parser → AST). Script has statements: command (current pipeline), variable assignment (VAR=value), if/for/while (with condition/body), source/run. Execute by interpreting the AST. Variables stored in a simple env (HashMap). Exit-on-error is a script option or set command.
- **Approach 2 (Embedded DSL in current parser)**: Extend the current line parser to recognize control keywords (if, for, while, VAR=...) and build a small AST per "block"; still one-line-one-command for the main path but with optional blocks. Lighter than a full script parser but can get messy.
- **Approach 3 (Two-phase: collect then run)**: Script file is parsed entirely into a list of "steps" (steps can be: run command, set var, if/for/while with nested steps). Then an interpreter runs the steps. Clear separation of parse vs execute.

I'll recommend something like 1 or 3: a clear script grammar, parse to AST/list of statements, then interpret. Variables: simple key-value, expand $VAR or ${VAR} in command lines before passing to existing pipeline. Conditionals: if [ condition ]; then ... fi or if command; then ... (run command, use exit code). Loops: for x in a b c; do ...; done and while command; do ...; done. source file: read file and execute in same VFS (could be recursive with a depth limit).

Let me write the design in sections and ask for approval.
</details></think>

---


已记录：**C（更完整）**——在「遇错即停」基础上，增加变量（`$VAR`）、条件（`if`）、循环（`for`/`while`），以及可选的 `source` 或子脚本。

下面给出 **2～3 种实现思路** 和推荐，然后分节写设计供你确认。

---

## 方案概览

| 方案 | 做法 | 优点 | 缺点 |
|------|------|------|------|
| **A. 脚本 AST 解释执行** | 为脚本定义一套小语法（词法+语法→AST）。脚本由「语句」组成：执行命令（当前 pipeline）、赋值 `VAR=value`、`if`/`for`/`while`（条件+体）、`source file`。解释器遍历 AST，维护变量表，在展开 `$VAR` 后把命令交给现有 `execute_pipeline`。 | 边界清晰、易扩展、易测；与现有 REPL「单行→pipeline」解耦。 | 需要一套脚本解析器（可先做简单版）。 |
| **B. 在现有行解析上扩展** | 在当前「一行一 pipeline」的解析上识别 `if`/`for`/`while`/`VAR=` 等，在解析阶段拼出「块」结构（条件+体）。 | 少一层「脚本语法」，复用现有 pipeline 解析。 | 行与块混在一起，错误恢复和语义容易变复杂。 |
| **C. 两阶段：先解析脚本再执行** | 脚本文件整体解析为「步骤列表」（步骤 = 执行命令 / 赋值 / if(条件, 体) / for/while(..., 体) / source）。再单独的解释器按步骤执行，变量在解释时展开。 | 解析与执行分离，便于测试和报错定位。 | 与 A 类似，本质是「脚本语法 + 解释器」，需定义步骤结构。 |

**推荐 A（或与 C 等价）**：为 dev_shell 定义明确的**脚本语法**（命令、赋值、if/for/while、source），解析成 AST 或步骤列表，由**解释器**在现有 VFS/REPL 上执行；变量用一张表维护，在交给 `execute_pipeline` 前做 `$VAR` 展开；遇错即停作为脚本级选项（如 `set -e` 或首行约定）。这样和现有 REPL 兼容，又便于后续加语法。

---

## 设计草案（分节确认）

下面按节写，你每节回复「通过」或要改的点即可。

---

### 第 1 节：目标与范围

- **目标**：在 dev_shell 内提供「类 Linux Shell」的脚本能力，用于多步任务自动化；仅作用于 dev_shell 内置命令与同一 VFS，不调用宿主 shell。
- **范围**：支持「从文件运行脚本」、注释与空行、变量（`VAR=value` 与 `$VAR`/`${VAR}` 展开）、条件（`if`）、循环（`for`/`while`）、遇错即停（如 `set -e`），以及可选的 `source <file>`（在同一 VFS 或宿主路径读文件执行）。不实现：管道/重定向的语法扩展（仍用现有 pipeline 语法）、后台任务、复杂算术表达式（条件以「命令退出码」或简单字符串比较为主）。
- **与 REPL 的关系**：交互式 REPL 保持「一行一 pipeline」；脚本模式为「解析整个脚本文件 → 解释执行」。可选：REPL 中支持 `source script.dsh` 或 `./script.dsh` 以在交互中跑脚本。

若同意，我按此写进设计说明（含「目标与范围」小节）。

---

### 第 2 节：脚本语法与语义（草案）

- **词法**：行尾 `\` 表示续行；`#` 到行尾为注释；空行忽略。字符串不强制要求引号，与现有 pipeline 一致；若需要可后续支持 `"..."` 内不展开变量或 `'...'` 字面量。
- **变量**：`NAME=value` 为赋值（value 为行内剩余部分 trim，可含空格）；`$VAR`、`${VAR}` 在命令参数中展开，未定义则展开为空或报错（可约定）。变量作用域：脚本全局（单层），或后续再考虑局部。
- **命令**：与当前一致，一行一条 pipeline（命令 + 管道 + 重定向）；执行前先做变量展开，再交现有 `parse_line`/`execute_pipeline`。
- **控制流**：  
  - **if**：`if command; then` … `fi`（或单行 `if command; then cmd; fi`）。条件为 command 的退出码（0 为真）。可选 `else`/`elif`。  
  - **for**：`for VAR in a b c; do` … `done`。循环体为多行命令。  
  - **while**：`while command; do` … `done`。条件为 command 退出码。  
- **source**：`source path` 或 `. path`。在**当前** VFS 或宿主路径读取 path 对应文件内容，按脚本解析并执行（同一 VFS、同一变量表）；需防递归（例如 source 深度上限）。
- **遇错即停**：脚本级选项（如首行 `set -e` 或命令行参数 `-e`）。开启时，某条命令（非 if/while 条件）退出非零则立即终止脚本并返回该退出码。

若同意，我将在设计说明中固定上述语法与语义，并注明「首期可实现子集」（例如先 if/for/while + 变量 + source，再补 set -e）。

---

### 第 3 节：架构与入口

- **入口**：支持 `dev_shell script.dsh` 或 `dev_shell -f script.dsh`（脚本文件为参数）；以及可选 `dev_shell -e script.dsh` 表示带 `set -e`。若未给脚本文件，则保持现有交互 REPL（或从 stdin 读，与现有一致）。
- **架构**：  
  - **脚本解析**：读入脚本文件 → 词法/语法 → 脚本 AST（或步骤列表）。  
  - **解释器**：遍历 AST，维护变量表、当前「遇错即停」标志；遇到「执行命令」节点时先做变量展开、再调用现有 pipeline 解析与 `execute_pipeline`；遇到 source 时递归解析并执行（带深度限制）。  
  - **与现有代码**：不替换现有 REPL 的 `process_line`，而是增加「脚本执行」路径；脚本中的「命令」仍通过现有 parser + `execute_pipeline` 执行，保证与交互行为一致。
- **错误处理**：解析错误（语法错误、未闭合的 if/for/while）报错并退出；运行时错误（命令失败、source 文件不存在）按「遇错即停」决定是否终止；终止时进程退出码为非零（例如 1 或最后失败命令的码）。

若同意，我将在设计说明中写清「入口、解析、解释、与 REPL 的关系」和错误处理约定。

---

### 第 4 节：测试与文档

- **测试**：为脚本解析器与解释器增加单元测试（仅解析、仅执行、解析+执行）；用例覆盖：变量赋值与展开、if/for/while、source 与深度限制、set -e、语法错误。可选：集成测试用现有 VFS 与内置命令跑小脚本并断言状态与输出。
- **文档**：在 README 或 dev_shell 文档中增加「脚本」小节：语法概要、示例脚本、入口用法（`dev_shell script.dsh`、`-e`、`source`），以及与交互 REPL 的差异（如 set -e 仅对脚本有效）。

若同意，我按此写设计说明的「测试与文档」部分。

---

请按节回复：  
- **第 1 节**（目标与范围）：通过 / 或要改的点  
- **第 2 节**（脚本语法与语义）：通过 / 或要改的点  
- **第 3 节**（架构与入口）：通过 / 或要改的点  
- **第 4 节**（测试与文档）：通过 / 或要改的点  

四节都通过后，我会把完整设计写入 `docs/superpowers/specs/YYYY-MM-DD-devshell-scripting-design.md`，并**不**写实现代码（遵守头脑风暴 HARD-GATE）。

四节均已通过，完整设计说明已写入：

**`docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-19-devshell-scripting-design.md`**

文档包含：
- **§1 目标与范围**：仅 dev_shell、支持脚本文件/变量/控制流/source/set -e，与 REPL 的关系
- **§2 脚本语法与语义**：词法（续行、注释）、变量赋值与展开、命令、if/for/while、source、遇错即停、首期子集
- **§3 架构与入口**：`dev_shell script.dsh` / `-f` / `-e`、解析→AST、解释器与变量表、错误处理
- **§4 测试与文档**：解析/解释单元测试与覆盖、README 脚本小节
- **§5 实现要点摘要**：解析模块、解释器、入口、可选 REPL 内 source、不实现项

---

1. **Spec 审阅**（可选）：你或 spec-document-reviewer 审阅该 spec，再按需修改。

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

I need to write an implementation plan that breaks down the devshell scripting feature into ordered tasks. The design says:

1. Script parsing: lex (line continuation, comments) + grammar (assignment, command, if/for/while, source) → AST
2. Interpreter: variable table, set -e, source depth; execute AST; command node → expand vars → execute_pipeline
3. Entry: run_main_from_args recognize -f/-e and script file, run script path; else keep REPL
4. Optional: REPL recognize source path or ./path
5. First phase: if/for/while + vars + source; then set -e

I'll write a plan with tasks in a reasonable order:
- Task 1: Entry point - parse args for -f, -e, script path; when script path present, read file and call script runner (stub)
- Task 2: Script lexer - line continuation, strip comments, blank lines; produce list of "logical lines"
- Task 3: Variable expansion - function that takes a string and a var map, expands $VAR and ${VAR}
- Task 4: Script AST - define types (Assign, Command, If, For, While, Source); parser from logical lines to AST
- Task 5: Interpreter - execute AST with vfs, var map, set_e flag, source depth; command → expand → parse_line → execute_pipeline
- Task 6: set -e - from CLI -e or "set -e" in script
- Task 7: REPL source - in process_line or run, detect source/./path and run script
- Task 8: Tests and docs

I'll put the plan in docs/superpowers/specs/ as 2026-03-19-devshell-scripting-impl-plan.md
</details></think>

Spec 已按「通过」处理，并已写好实现计划。

**实现计划文件**：`docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-19-devshell-scripting-impl-plan.md`

**计划概要**（8 个任务，按顺序做）：

| 顺序 | 任务 | 内容 |
|------|------|------|
| 1 | 入口与脚本文件读取 | `dev_shell [-e] [-f] script.dsh`，读脚本并调用 `run_script`（先做逐行执行的 stub） |
| 2 | 脚本词法 | 续行（`\`）、注释（`#`）、空行 → 逻辑行列表 |
| 3 | 变量展开 | `$VAR` / `${VAR}`，未定义展开为空 |
| 4 | 脚本 AST 与解析 | Assign / Command / If / For / While / Source，从逻辑行解析出 AST |
| 5 | 解释器 | 变量表、set_e、source 深度；按 AST 执行，命令走 `expand → parse_line → execute_pipeline` |
| 6 | set -e 与 -e | 脚本内 `set -e` 与命令行 `-e` 生效 |
| 7 | REPL 内 source（可选） | 交互下 `source path` / `. path` 执行脚本 |
| 8 | 测试与文档 | 解析/解释/集成测试，README 脚本小节 |

建议实现顺序：**1 → 2 → 3 → 4 → 5 → 6 → 8**，Task 7 可放在最后或单独做。

需要的话可以从 **Task 1** 开始一步步写代码。

So: with -f we need one more arg (script path). Without -f, one arg = .bin path. So logic: i = 1; let mut set_e = false; let mut script_path = None; let mut bin_path = ".dev_shell.bin"; while i < args.len() { if args[i] == "-e" { set_e = true; i += 1; } else if args[i] == "-f" { i += 1; if i < args.len() { script_path = Some(args[i].clone()); i += 1; } else { writeln!(stderr, "usage: ..."); return Err; } } else { if script_path.is_some() { two positionals? invalid } if script_path.is_none() && !args[i].starts_with('-') { script_path = Some(args[i].clone()); } else { bin_path = args[i].clone(); } i += 1; } } No: design says "dev_shell script.dsh" (without -f) runs script. So one arg = either script (if we want) or .bin. Let me re-read. "dev_shell script.dsh 或 dev_shell -f script.dsh" - so both mean run script. So one positional = script path (run script). Zero positionals = REPL. Then what about "dev_shell my.bin" for REPL with custom .bin? Maybe we drop that for now or we say two positionals: first .bin second script? Simplest: 0 positionals => REPL, bin = .dev_shell.bin. 1 positional => run as script, bin = .dev_shell.bin (for VFS load). With -f the positional is explicitly script. With -e we set set_e. So: 0 positionals after flags => REPL. 1 positional => script. So we need to collect flags -e -f, then the first remaining arg is script path (if any). So: let mut i = 1; let mut set_e = false; while i < args.len() && args[i].starts_with('-') && args[i] != "--" { if args[i] == "-e" { set_e = true; } else if args[i] == "-f" { } // just skip i += 1; } if i >= args.len() { REPL with .dev_shell.bin } else { script_path = args[i]; i += 1; if i < args.len() { usage error } read script, run_script }

Zero non-flags = REPL. So: non_flags: Vec<_> = args[1..].iter().filter(|a| *a != "-e" && *a != "-f").collect(); set_e = args[1..].contains(&"-e"); if non_flags.is_empty() { REPL } else if non_flags.len() == 1 { script_path = non_flags[0]; run script } else { usage } That way dev_shell -e -f foo.dsh and dev_shell foo.dsh and dev_shell -f foo.dsh all work.
